name: One, Two, Three, Four, Five (Chinese Pork Ste
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a sharp knife to cut the spareribs in half.
2. Place the green onions at the bottom of a large saucepan.
3. Add the spareribs on top of the green onions.
4. Pour in the wine, vinegar, sugar, soy sauce, and water.
5. Cover and bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
6. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for about 2 hours.
7. Serve hot with white rice to absorb the liquid.
Makes about 4 servings. This recipe is simple and meant to indicate its ease of preparation, as it originates from an old Chinese cookbook.
